perturbation.original_text: All payments due under this Agreement shall be made in the form of a check drawn to the order of "Rick Smith" and delivered to Smith's agent at the following address: Gaylord Sports Management, l4646 N. Kierland Blvd., Suite 230, Scottsdale, Arizona 85254, Attn: Steve Loy. Payments shall be made 15 days from the end of each 2 quarter. Smith's net payment after any such charges or deductions shall equal the amount set forth above. Past due payments hereunder shall bear interest at the rate of (i) one and one-half percent (1-1/2%) per month, or (ii) the maximum interest rate permissible under law, whichever is less.
perturbation.changed_text: All payments due under this Agreement shall be made in the form of a check drawn to the order of "Rick Smith" and delivered to Smith's agent at the following address: Gaylord Sports Management, l4646 N. Kierland Blvd., Suite 230, Scottsdale, Arizona 85254, Attn: Steve Loy. Payments shall be made 60 days from the invoice date. Smith's net payment after any such charges or deductions shall equal the amount set forth above. Past due payments hereunder shall bear interest at the rate of (i) one and one-half percent (1-1/2%) per month, or (ii) the maximum interest rate permissible under law, whichever is less.
perturbation.explanation: The perturbation changes the payment deadline from '15 days from the end of each 2 quarter' to '60 days from the invoice date.' This introduces an in-text contradiction because the original text implies payments are tied to calendar quarters, whereas the changed text ties them to individual invoice dates, causing uncertainty and potential disputes on when payments are actually due. It is also unclear in the definition, on what happens if the invoice date is not specified.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Compensation for Rights and Services. TDA agrees to pay Smith, as a consideration for the Rights and Services. 1) 25,000 Restricted common shares of TDA, a. As of the date of this agreement, Company has sold stock at $2.50/share. b. Par Value is $.0001 per share. 2) 25% royalty of net TDA net sales price. 3) Option to convert annual royalties to TDA common stock at a $10 of stock for every $1 of Royalty converted. a. TDA stock conversion price based on the previous six month average daily price b. Option is limited to 50% of TDA outstanding stock and if the option is exercised, it must be exercised when the agreement &sbsp; is in effect. All payments due under this Agreement shall be made in the form of a check drawn to the order of "Rick Smith" and delivered to Smith's agent at the following address: Gaylord Sports Management, l4646 N. Kierland Blvd., Suite 230, Scottsdale, Arizona 85254, Attn: Steve Loy. Payments shall be made 60 days from the invoice date. Smith's net payment after any such charges or deductions shall equal the amount set forth above. Past due payments hereunder shall bear interest at the rate of (i) one and one-half percent (1-1/2%) per month, or (ii) the maximum interest rate permissible under law, whichever is less.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the payment deadline, shifting it from '15 days from the end of each 2 quarter' to '60 days from the invoice date,' and both the Changed and Contradicted text are from the same section. This creates an inconsistency as the original text links payments to calendar quarters while the changed text links them to invoice dates, which is a blatant inconsistency and thus aligns with the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition, which specifies conflicting deadlines. The contradicted text is the entirety of the provided document, and thus the change directly affects it.

perturbation.original_text: 5. AUDIT 5.1 Licensee shall keep accurate books of account and records at its principal place of business covering all transactions relating to the License granted herein. Smith shall have the right to engage an independent accounting firm to examine the Licensee's sales information and all other books and records necessary to establish the accuracy and timeliness of the royalty statements required hereunder. Such examination shall be at the premises of Licensee on ten (10) working days written notice and during normal business hours. The information provided to Smith by the accounting firm will be the net sales and the application of the appropriate royalty rate to calculate royalties due.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. AUDIT 5.1 Licensee shall keep accurate books of account and records at its principal place of business covering all transactions relating to the License granted herein. Smith shall have the right to engage an independent accounting firm to examine the Licensee's sales information and all other books and records necessary to establish the accuracy and timeliness of the royalty statements required hereunder. Such examination shall be at the premises of Licensee on ten (10) working days written notice and during normal business hours. The information provided to Smith by the accounting firm will be the gross sales and the application of the appropriate royalty rate to calculate royalties due.
perturbation.explanation: The perturbation alters the audit terms, changing 'net sales' to 'gross sales' as the basis for royalty calculation verification. This introduces an in-text contradiction, because section 4.2 specifies that Smith receives 25% royalty of 'net TDA net sales price' . Thus, the books should be calculated via 'net sales', creating confusion and disagreement. The difference impacts royalty amounts, potentially leading to disputes.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Compensation for Rights and Services. TDA agrees to pay Smith, as a consideration for the Rights and Services. 1) 25,000 Restricted common shares of TDA, a. As of the date of this agreement, Company has sold stock at $2.50/share. b. Par Value is $.0001 per share. 2) 25% royalty of net TDA net sales price. 3) Option to convert annual royalties to TDA common stock at a $10 of stock for every $1 of Royalty converted. a. TDA stock conversion price based on the previous six month average daily price b. Option is limited to 50% of TDA outstanding stock and if the option is exercised, it must be exercised when the agreement &sbsp; is in effect. All payments due under this Agreement shall be made in the form of a check drawn to the order of "Rick Smith" and delivered to Smith's agent at the following address: Gaylord Sports Management, l4646 N. Kierland Blvd., Suite 230, Scottsdale, Arizona 85254, Attn: Steve Loy. Payments shall be made 15 days from the end of each 2 quarter. Smith's net payment after any such charges or deductions shall equal the amount set forth above. Past due payments hereunder shall bear interest at the rate of (i) one and one-half percent (1-1/2%) per month, or (ii) the maximum interest rate permissible under law, whichever is less.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies Section 5.1 to state that the accounting firm will verify royalties based on 'gross sales,' while the contradicted text (Compensation for Rights and Services) specifies royalties are calculated as '25% royalty of net TDA net sales price.' This creates a direct contradiction because the basis for royalty calculation and audit verification differs between the two sections. This inconsistency creates uncertainty regarding the applicable royalty calculation methodology, thus conflicting and causing a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 8. OWNERSHIP OF PROPRIETARY RIGHTS 8.1 All right, title and interest in and to TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products shall be and remain the absolute property of TDA forever (it being understood that after the Term TDA may continue to manufacture, promote, sell and/or distribute its other golf instruction related interactive entertainment sports products which are separate and distinct from the Golf Instruction Related Products incorporating Smith's Likeness on the packaging without being subject to any of the limitations or restriction herein, provided that the Rights are not (directly or indirectly) utilized by or incorporated in such other golf instruction related interactive sports products.
perturbation.changed_text: 8. OWNERSHIP OF PROPRIETARY RIGHTS 8.1 All right, title and interest in and to TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products shall be and remain the joint property of TDA and Smith forever (it being understood that after the Term TDA may continue to manufacture, promote, sell and/or distribute its other golf instruction related interactive entertainment sports products which are separate and distinct from the Golf Instruction Related Products incorporating Smith's Likeness on the packaging without being subject to any of the limitations or restriction herein, provided that the Rights are not (directly or indirectly) utilized by or incorporated in such other golf instruction related interactive sports products.
perturbation.explanation: The perturbation modifies the ownership clause to state that the Golf Instruction Related Products are the 'joint property of TDA and Smith', contradicting the original text and the general intent of the agreement where TDA owns all rights. This in-text contradiction introduces major uncertainty about who controls the product, how profits are shared, and who can make decisions about its future development and distribution. This is specifically contradicting the original text of 8.1 where TDA owns the 'absolute property'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All right, title and interest in and to TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products shall be and remain the joint property of TDA and Smith forever (it being understood that after the Term TDA may continue to manufacture, promote, sell and/or distribute its other golf instruction related interactive entertainment sports products which are separate and distinct from the Golf Instruction Related Products incorporating Smith's Likeness on the packaging without being subject to any of the limitations or restriction herein, provided that the Rights are not (directly or indirectly) utilized by or incorporated in such other golf instruction related interactive sports products. All right, title and interest in and to the Results and Proceeds and to the Advertising Materials (as defined below) shall be and remain the absolute property of TDA forever (but which may only be used during the Term and, subject to the limitations and conditions set forth in this Agreement, thereafter).
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies section 8.1 to state that the Golf Instruction Related Products are the 'joint property of TDA and Smith', which directly contradicts the original statement in the same section (which is also the contradicted text) that 'All right, title and interest in and to TDA's Golf Instruction Related Products shall be and remain the absolute property of TDA forever'. This creates a clear in-text contradiction regarding ownership, leading to uncertainty about control, profit sharing, and decision-making related to the product, making the terms incompatible and triggering an 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' as defined.
